posts.author: ranvir
posts.text: Sarda Energy and Minerals - Q4 and FY 26 concall highlights - Company’s current capacities - Power segment - Thermal - 2 X 300 = 600 MW near Raipur in Chhattisgarh Captive Thermal - 81.5 MW @ Siltara, Chattisgarh + 80 MW @ Vizag, AP = 161.5 MW Hyro - 4.8 MW in Uttarakhand + 24 MW + 25 MW in Chattisgarh + 113 MW in Sikkim = 54 MW Solar - 50 MW in Chattisgarh - under construction. Expected to be commissioned in Q1 FY 27 Grand total @ 930 MW. Company intends to almost double their Power generation capacity to > 1720 MW Mining segment - Coal Mining - Gare Palma, Chattisgarh - 1.8 MTPA Iron ore min…
